scope_change_summary: Broadened from Treg-depletion-only to Treg-depletion-OR-inhibition-OR-destabilization. New intervention families searched: anti-TNFR2, anti-TIGIT, EP4 antagonists, DNMTi/HMA (Treg-focused), HDACi (Treg-focused), Helios/IKZF2/cereblon degraders (iberdomide, mezigdomide), PI3Kδ inhibitors (function-focused), NRP1, anti-GITR/OX40 (function-focused), IL-1/IL-6/TNF blockers (Treg-focused), CAR-T/bispecifics targeting Tregs, FoxP3/TSDR destabilization endpoints.

queries.query: ("anti-TNFR2"[tiab] OR "TNFR2 antagonist"[tiab] OR "TNFR2 antibody"[tiab] OR "BAT2506"[tiab] OR "HFB200301"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab])

("tiragolumab"[tiab] OR "vibostolimab"[tiab] OR "domvanalimab"[tiab] OR "ociperlimab"[tiab] OR "anti-TIGIT"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab] OR "suppressive function"[tiab])

("azacitidine"[tiab] OR "decitabine"[tiab] OR "guadecitabine"[tiab] OR "DNMT inhibitor"[tiab] OR "hypomethylating"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab] OR "TSDR"[tiab]) AND ("patient"[tiab] OR "clinical"[tiab] OR "trial"[tiab])

("romidepsin"[tiab] OR "vorinostat"[tiab] OR "panobinostat"[tiab] OR "entinostat"[tiab] OR "mocetinostat"[tiab] OR "HDAC inhibitor"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab] OR "suppressive function"[tiab]) AND ("patient"[tiab] OR "clinical"[tiab] OR "trial"[tiab])
("mezigdomide"[tiab] OR "iberdomide"[tiab] OR "CC-220"[tiab] OR "CC-92480"[tiab] OR "CELMoD"[tiab] OR "IKZF2"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab])
("grapiprant"[tiab] OR "ONO-4578"[tiab] OR "EP4 antagonist"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab])

("idelalisib"[tiab] OR "copanlisib"[tiab] OR "umbralisib"[tiab] OR "duvelisib"[tiab] OR "parsaclisib"[tiab] OR "PI3K delta"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "suppressive function"[tiab]) AND ("patient"[tiab] OR "clinical"[tiab] OR "trial"[tiab])

("CCR8 CAR"[tiab] OR "Treg CAR"[tiab] OR "Treg depleting"[tiab] OR "neuropilin-1"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "FOXP3"[tiab]) AND ("patient"[tiab] OR "clinical"[tiab] OR "trial"[tiab])

("FoxP3 instability"[tiab] OR "FOXP3 loss"[tiab] OR "TSDR methylation"[tiab] OR "Treg destabilization"[tiab] OR "Treg fragility"[tiab] OR "Treg conversion"[tiab]) AND ("clinical"[tiab] OR "patient"[tiab] OR "trial"[tiab])

("TRX518"[tiab] OR "MK-4166"[tiab] OR "BMS-986156"[tiab] OR "PF-04518600"[tiab] OR "MEDI6469"[tiab] OR "MOXR0916"[tiab] OR "anti-OX40"[tiab] OR "anti-GITR"[tiab]) AND ("suppressive function"[tiab] OR "Treg function"[tiab])

("iberdomide"[tiab] OR "CC-220"[tiab] OR "mezigdomide"[tiab] OR "CC-92480"[tiab]) AND ("patient"[tiab] OR "phase"[tiab] OR "clinical"[tiab]) AND ("Treg"[tiab] OR "regulatory T"[tiab] OR "immune"[tiab] OR "pharmacodynamic"[tiab])

key_findings: Anti-TNFR2 clinical literature is essentially non-existent in indexed journals — Torrey 2019 Sézary study is EX VIVO only, not clinical infusion.
Anti-TIGIT: Guan 2024 Nature (CITYSCAPE + GO30103) provides the cleanest PBMC Treg-frequency decrease on tiragolumab + atezolizumab; all other anti-TIGIT Treg data are preclinical or ex-vivo.

DNMT inhibitors: decitabine and azacitidine INCREASE Treg quantity and function in most clinical contexts (Han 2021 ITP; Penter 2023 post-ipilimumab). This is opposite to our initial hypothesis. The ONE clinical exception where they DECREASE Tregs is in combination with panobinostat (Govindaraj 2014) targeting TNFR2+ Tregs specifically.

HDAC inhibitors have heterogeneous Treg effects: entinostat decreases Tregs (Pili 2017 RCC; Terranova-Barberio 2020 breast cancer — the latter is vorinostat+pembro+tamoxifen) BUT panobinostat in HIV INCREASES Tregs +40% (Brinkmann 2018). Entinostat+nivo±ipi (Roussos Torres 2021) shifts CD8:FoxP3 ratio but only after ICI addition.

Iberdomide in SLE INCREASES Tregs +104.9% (Lipsky 2022) — opposite hypothesis. Iberdomide in MM (Amatangelo 2024) shows baseline Treg elevation in non-responders but no clear longitudinal Treg depletion.
PI3Kδ: idelalisib uniformly decreases Tregs in CLL (Gadi 2022 n=9), but absolute numerics not reported in abstract/paper.
Helios degrader literature is dominated by preclinical (Bonazzi 2023 Cell Chem Biol selective IKZF2 glue); no first-in-human Helios-selective data indexed in PubMed as of 2026-04-23.
EP4 antagonists, CAR-T/NRP1: all preclinical, no human Treg PD.
honest_coverage_gaps: TNFR2 antagonists in humans with Treg PD: 0 clinical rows. BAT2506 and HFB200301 are in early trials but no peer-reviewed PD readouts.
IKZF2-selective (Helios) degraders: 0 clinical rows. Preclinical only.
EP4 antagonists in humans with Treg PD: 0 clinical rows.
Anti-CCR8 clinical PD with Treg functional impairment: 0 new rows (already searched in prior run; none with suppressive-function readouts).
Mezigdomide (MM): efficacy trials reported but no Treg-specific PD extracted yet.
NRP1 blockade in humans with Treg PD: 0 rows.
